name: 60GHz Wireless
description: MikroTik's 60GHz Wireless Category consists of high-speed, fiber-like wireless solutions designed to replace cables or provide high-bandwidth links over short to medium distances. These devices operate in the unlicensed 60GHz spectrum, which avoids the interference common in 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands.
